reason: Successfully verified that the agent can use the GitHub tool to retrieve the authenticated user's GitHub username after granting account access.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — App loaded successfully with sidebar showing agents list
Clicked on "QA-20260410-165009-wdd5" agent in the sidebar — Agent opened and displayed landing page
Verified agent status "idle" — Status indicator showed "idle" which meets the requirement of "running" or "idle"
Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message input accepted and sent button clicked
Agent status changed to "working" and began processing the request — New session "GitHub Username Verification Request" created
Account access request card appeared asking to grant GitHub account access — GitHub account was already selected (checked)
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant GitHub access — Permission granted and agent resumed processing
API request review card appeared for "GET /user" endpoint — Clicked "Allow Once" to permit the GitHub API request
Agent continued processing and completed within 44 seconds — Agent status returned to "idle"
Verified response includes GitHub username "yiw190" — Response states: "Your GitHub username is yiw190. You're on the GitHub Pro plan with 3 public repos and 13 private repos."
Took screenshot documenting the final result — Screenshot saved showing the complete response with GitHub username
